engineIntelligence.h2: Cadillac SRX Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Cadillac SRX in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Cadillac SRX LFX engine - petrol 3.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain guide wear - plastic guides deteriorate causing rattle on cold starts, typically 70k-100k miles.
Excessive oil consumption - piston ring wear leads to increased oil burn on higher-mileage LFX units.
Water pump leak - internal seal failure causes coolant loss and potential overheating.

cards.altText: Cadillac SRX LY7 engine - petrol 3.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure - tensioners wear causing chain slap and potential engine damage, 60k-90k miles.
Oil consumption issues - early LY7 units prone to piston ring wear and increased oil burn.
Thermostat housing leak - plastic housing cracks causing coolant loss and overheating risk.

cards.altText: Cadillac SRX LH2 engine - petrol 4.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Northstar head bolt failure - thread pull-out in aluminium block causing head gasket failure, high-mileage risk.
Timing chain guide wear - plastic guides deteriorate causing rattles and potential timing issues.
Oil cooler line leak - rubber hoses degrade causing ATF or oil leaks around engine bay.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £3,500-£6,200 (supply only) Estimated from comparable LH2 units - actual quotes may vary.

commonProblems.h2: Cadillac SRX Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Cadillac SRX's GM High Feature V6 engines dominate UK replacement enquiries, particularly timing chain and oil consumption issues on LY7 and LFX units. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost comparisons below to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your SRX.

problems.group: Cadillac SRX Timing Chain Tensioner Failure
problems.h4: Cadillac SRX Timing Chain Tensioner Failure - Why High Feature V6 Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac SRX Base, Luxury, Premium (2004-2009, LY7); SRX Luxury/Premium/Performance Collection (2010-2016, LFX)
problems.rootCause: Plastic timing chain tensioners and guides deteriorate with heat and age, allowing chain slack that causes rattling, timing variation, and potential valve interference if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioners and guides only; chain retained if within wear limits
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early before chain stretch; 30k-50k mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioners, guides, phasers; engine partially stripped
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses root cause; suitable if block/head undamaged; 60k+ mile expectation

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded timing components, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when damage has occurred; eliminates recurrence risk; like-new reliability

problems.recommendation: If your SRX shows early cold-start rattle but no performance loss, a preventative tensioner/guide replacement at a specialist can extend life cost-effectively. However, once chain stretch has caused timing errors or damage, replacement with a rebuilt unit featuring upgraded components is the only reliable long-term solution.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt LFX/LY7 engine prices for your Cadillac SRX

problems.h4: Cadillac SRX Excessive Oil Consumption - Piston Ring Wear on High Mileage V6 Units
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac SRX all 3.6L V6 variants (2004-2016, LY7/LFX/LF1)
problems.rootCause: Piston ring design and carbon buildup cause rings to stick, allowing oil to pass into combustion chambers; worsens with short-trip driving and infrequent oil changes.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve cover gaskets, inspect breather system
repairOptions.longevity: May reduce consumption if PCV-related; does not fix worn rings; temporary measure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder heads, replace piston rings, decarbonise; block retained
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses root cause if block undamaged; labour-intensive; 40k-60k mile expectation

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with Upgraded Rings
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with revised piston/ring specification, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable solution; eliminates consumption risk; cost-effective vs repeated repairs

problems.recommendation: For SRX owners noticing increased oil top-ups, start with a PCV system check and compression test. If consumption exceeds 1 litre per 1,000 miles, ring replacement or engine rebuild becomes necessary. Given labour costs, a rebuilt engine with upgraded components often represents better long-term value.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Cadillac SRX 3.6L rebuilt engines with upgraded pistons

problems.h4: Cadillac SRX Water Pump Failure - Coolant Loss and Overheating Risk
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac SRX all 3.6L V6 variants (2004-2016, LY7/LFX)
problems.rootCause: Internal water pump seals degrade, allowing coolant to leak into the timing cover cavity; often undetected until significant loss occurs.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace water pump, gaskets, coolant flush; timing cover accessed
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if caught early before overheating damage; 40k-60k mile expectation

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine if overheating caused head/block damage; 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Required if coolant loss led to overheating; prevents repeat failure; peace of mind

problems.recommendation: Water pump failure is often preventable with proactive replacement at 60k miles. If your SRX has overheated due to pump failure, have the head gasket and block checked immediately - if damage is confirmed, engine replacement is more cost-effective than repeated repairs.
problems.cta: Compare Cadillac SRX water pump repair vs rebuilt engine costs

problems.group: Cadillac SRX Northstar V8 Head Bolt Failure
problems.h4: Cadillac SRX Northstar V8 Head Bolt Failure - Aluminium Block Thread Pull-Out
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac SRX V8, V8 AWD (2004-2009, LH2 4.6L Northstar)
problems.rootCause: Northstar engine's aluminium block threads can pull out under cylinder pressure, causing head gasket failure, coolant/oil mixing, and loss of compression.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove heads, install steel thread inserts (Timeserts), new head gaskets
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block damage is limited; requires specialist machining; 30k-50k mile expectation

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt LH2 with reinforced head bolt provisions, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable solution for high-mileage V8 SRX; eliminates recurrence; enthusiast-grade rebuild

problems.recommendation: Northstar head bolt failure is a known design vulnerability. If your V8 SRX shows coolant loss, white exhaust smoke, or compression loss, obtain a borescope inspection. For most owners, a rebuilt LH2 with reinforced provisions offers better long-term value than repeated Timesert repairs.
problems.cta: Enquire about Cadillac SRX LH2 Northstar rebuilt engine availability

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Cadillac SRX
finalCta.paragraph: Whether your SRX suffers from timing chain rattle, oil consumption, or water pump failure, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Cadillac SRX specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Get multiple quotes, compare supply-only vs supply & fit options, and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Cadillac SRX Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Cadillac SRX and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Cadillac SRX Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Cadillac SRX is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the correct replacement.

items.title: Cadillac SRX 3.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.0L High Feature V6 (LF1) was a rare fitment in UK-imported SRX models, primarily appearing in early Gen 2 base trims before the 3.6L became standard. It offered adequate power but limited UK availability means replacement units require careful sourcing.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain component wear similar to LFX; lower UK prevalence means fewer documented failure patterns
items.cta: Compare Cadillac SRX 3.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Cadillac SRX 3.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.6L High Feature V6 dominates Cadillac SRX replacement enquiries, with LY7 (255hp) powering Gen 1 (2004-2009) and LFX (308hp) defining Gen 2 (2010-2016). Both share timing chain vulnerability but LFX offers improved power and refinement for Luxury/Premium/Performance Collections.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain tensioner/guide wear 60k-100k miles; oil consumption from piston ring wear; water pump internal seal leaks
items.cta: Compare Cadillac SRX 3.6L petrol engine prices

items.title: Cadillac SRX 4.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 4.6L Northstar V8 (LH2) was the performance flagship for Gen 1 SRX, offering 320hp and enthusiast appeal. Complex rebuild requirements and known head bolt thread vulnerability mean replacement costs are higher, but specialist rebuilders can address design weaknesses.
commonFailurePoints: Northstar head bolt thread pull-out in aluminium block; timing chain guide wear; oil cooler line degradation
items.cta: Compare Cadillac SRX 4.6L petrol engine prices

engineSizes.closing: Not sure which engine size your Cadillac SRX needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Cadillac SRX specialists.

engineYears.h2: Cadillac SRX Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Cadillac SRX production timeline (2004-2016), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Gen 1 SRX: LY7 3.6L & LH2 4.6L V8 Launch
years.description: The first-generation SRX launched with the 255hp LY7 3.6L V6 and optional 320hp LH2 Northstar V8, establishing the timing chain vulnerability that would dominate UK replacement enquiries.
keyChanges: SRX launched as Cadillac's mid-size luxury SUV contender
LY7 3.6L High Feature V6 became the volume engine across Base/Luxury/Premium trims
LH2 4.6L Northstar V8 offered as performance flagship option
AWD system introduced alongside FWD configuration
knownFor: Smooth V6 refinement but early timing chain tensioner wear concerns
Northstar V8 enthusiast appeal but complex rebuild requirements
Oil consumption issues emerging on higher-mileage LY7 units
Strong import presence in UK right-hand drive conversions
years.cta: Get quotes for 2004-2009 Cadillac SRX replacement engines
years.ticker: Cadillac SRX LY7 timing chain replacement • SRX 3.6L oil consumption fix • Northstar V8 head bolt repair
enquiries: Cadillac SRX LY7 timing chain replacement

years.preview: Gen 2 SRX: LFX 3.6L Refinement & Collection Trims
years.description: The second-generation SRX introduced the revised 308hp LFX engine with improved power and emissions, but retained timing chain guide vulnerability that continues to drive UK replacement demand.
keyChanges: New platform with revised styling and interior technology
LFX 3.6L High Feature V6 replaced LY7 as standard engine (308hp vs 255hp)
Collection trim hierarchy introduced: Luxury, Premium, Performance
Enhanced emissions compliance for UK market acceptance
knownFor: Improved power and refinement over Gen 1 LY7
Timing chain guide wear remains primary failure pattern 70k-100k miles
Oil consumption issues persist on higher-mileage LFX units
Highest UK replacement demand due to larger Gen 2 population

faq.h2: Cadillac SRX Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Cadillac SRX engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Cadillac SRX engine replacement costs typically range from £2,600 to £4,200 for rebuilt 3.6L V6 units (LY7/LFX), with Northstar V8 (LH2) rebuilds from £3,500 to £6,200. Prices vary by engine code, condition type, and whether you choose supply-only or supply & fit.
keyPoints: LY7 3.6L rebuilt engines: £2,600-£3,800 supply only
LFX 3.6L rebuilt engines: £2,800-£4,200 supply only
LH2 4.6L V8 rebuilt engines: £3,500-£6,200 supply only
Supply & fit adds £800-£1,500 depending on location
All rebuilt engines include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Compare Cadillac SRX engine replacement prices from UK specialists

items.question: What engine codes fit the Cadillac SRX?
items.answer: The Cadillac SRX was fitted with four main engine codes: LY7 (255hp 3.6L V6, 2004-2009), LFX (308hp 3.6L V6, 2010-2016), LF1 (265hp 3.0L V6, rare), and LH2 (320hp 4.6L Northstar V8, 2004-2009). Enter your registration to verify your exact engine code instantly.
keyPoints: LY7: Gen 1 3.6L V6, 255hp, timing chain tensioner vulnerability
LFX: Gen 2 3.6L V6, 308hp, improved power but similar timing chain risks
LF1: Rare 3.0L V6, 265hp, limited UK availability
LH2: Northstar 4.6L V8, 320hp, head bolt thread concerns
items.cta: Get quotes for your specific Cadillac SRX engine code

items.question: Is a rebuilt Cadillac SRX engine reliable?
items.answer: Yes, rebuilt Cadillac SRX engines from vetted UK specialists are highly reliable when they include upgraded components addressing known failure points like timing chain guides and piston rings. All rebuilt engines supplied through EngineMarket carry a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines include upgraded timing components and revised piston rings
Bench testing ensures performance before dispatch
12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across network
Specialist rebuilders address known LY7/LFX failure patterns
items.cta: Find rebuilt Cadillac SRX engines with upgraded components

items.question: How long does Cadillac SRX engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical turnaround for a rebuilt Cadillac SRX engine is 3-5 working days for supply-only, with supply & fit appointments adding 1-2 days for delivery and installation. Urgent replacements may be available from stock depending on engine code and location.
keyPoints: Supply-only rebuilt engines: 3-5 working days typical
Supply & fit service: add 1-2 days for delivery and fitting
Used engines may offer same-day collection from some suppliers
Northstar V8 (LH2) rebuilds may require longer lead times
items.cta: Check Cadillac SRX engine stock availability and turnaround times

items.question: What causes Cadillac SRX engine failure?
items.answer: The most common causes of Cadillac SRX engine failure are timing chain tensioner/guide wear (60k-100k miles), excessive oil consumption from piston ring wear, and water pump internal seal leaks. Early diagnosis can prevent catastrophic damage.
keyPoints: Timing chain component wear causes rattles and potential timing errors
Oil consumption increases with piston ring carbon buildup
Water pump leaks lead to coolant loss and overheating risk
Northstar V8 head bolt thread pull-out is a known design vulnerability
items.cta: Compare repair vs replacement costs for your Cadillac SRX engine problem

items.question: Does Cadillac SRX engine replacement affect MoT?
items.answer: No, replacing your Cadillac SRX engine with a like-for-like rebuilt unit does not affect MoT compliance, provided the replacement engine matches the original emissions specification. Documentation of the engine change should be retained for V5C updates if required.
keyPoints: Like-for-like engine swaps maintain original emissions classification
Retain invoices and engine code documentation for V5C updates
ULEZ compliance depends on original vehicle registration date, not engine replacement
Specialist fitters can advise on post-installation calibration requirements
items.cta: Enquire about Cadillac SRX engine replacement and emissions compliance

items.question: Are Cadillac SRX engines ULEZ compliant?
items.answer: Cadillac SRX compliance with London's ULEZ depends on the vehicle's original registration date, not the replacement engine. Most SRX models registered before 2006 do not meet ULEZ standards regardless of engine condition.
keyPoints: ULEZ compliance is determined by original vehicle registration, not engine replacement
Pre-2006 petrol vehicles generally do not meet Euro 4 ULEZ threshold
Engine replacement does not change the vehicle's emissions classification
Check Transport for London's vehicle checker for your specific SRX
items.cta: Compare Cadillac SRX engine prices regardless of ULEZ status

items.question: What warranty comes with Cadillac SRX rebuilt engines?
items.answer: All rebuilt Cadillac SRX engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty as standard. Some specialists offer extended coverage options - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before ordering.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across network
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Supply & fit installations typically include fitting warranty
Extended warranty options may be available from select specialists
items.cta: Get quotes for Cadillac SRX rebuilt engines with 12-month warranty

items.question: How do I know which Cadillac SRX engine I need?
items.answer: Enter your registration number above to instantly identify your Cadillac SRX's exact engine code, displacement, and compatible replacement options via the DVLA database. Alternatively, check your V5C document or engine bay stamping for the factory engine code.
keyPoints: DVLA lookup via registration provides instant engine code verification
V5C registration document lists engine capacity and fuel type
Engine code is stamped on the block (visible with inspection)
LY7/LFX codes are not interchangeable without ECU recalibration
items.cta: Use our free registration checker to identify your Cadillac SRX engine

items.question: Can I fit a Cadillac SRX engine myself?
items.answer: While technically possible for experienced mechanics, Cadillac SRX engine replacement requires specialist tools, ECU calibration equipment, and knowledge of GM High Feature V6 procedures. We recommend using a vetted specialist to maintain warranty validity and ensure correct installation.
keyPoints: GM High Feature V6 requires specific timing procedures and tools
ECU recalibration needed after engine replacement for optimal performance
Specialist installation maintains rebuilt engine warranty validity
Supply-only option available if you have access to qualified fitting facilities
items.cta: Find Cadillac SRX engine supply & fit specialists near you
